validation_checks.name: trace_row_count_nonzero
validation_checks.description: Canonical execution traces contain a non-trivial number of rows

validation_checks.name: transaction_count_nonzero
validation_checks.description: Unique transaction count is positive and reasonable for the block range

validation_checks.name: mev_patterns_identifiable
validation_checks.description: At least 3 distinct MEV pattern types are structurally identifiable from trace fields
validation_checks.value: arbitrage (cyclic value flow), sandwich (intra-block positioning), liquidation (function selector), backrunning (sequential positioning)

validation_checks.name: trace_fields_sufficient
validation_checks.description: Trace data contains from, to, value, call_type, input fields necessary for structural classification
validation_checks.value: from, to, value, call_type, input, trace_address confirmed in schema

validation_checks.name: classification_limitations_documented
validation_checks.description: Evidence explicitly documents what the trace data cannot support for MEV taxonomy
validation_checks.value: documented: token-denominated MEV, full ABI decoding, event log correlation
